## Test plan

- [ ] Branch follows [gitflow naming](https://iainchesworth.github.io/CountdownSolver/CONTRIBUTING/#branching-model) (`feature/*`, `bugfix/*`, ...) and targets `develop`

- [ ] `clang-format`/`clang-tidy` clean
